_description: OpenAI GPT-4o (gpt-4o-2025-03-27). Multimodal flagship with native tool calling, JSON mode, and 128K context. Fast, capable, and cost-effective for most tasks. Supports parallel function calling and structured outputs.

tool_calling._comment: GPT-4o has native parallel function calling. strict_mode ensures function call arguments match the schema exactly.

structured_output._comment: GPT-4o supports structured outputs with guaranteed schema adherence via json_schema response format.

dynamic_temperature._comment: Lower temperature on retries for more deterministic tool call output.

tool_call_batching.system_prompt_suffix: When multiple tools are needed, call ALL of them in a single response using parallel function calling.
tool_call_batching._comment: GPT-4o natively supports parallel function calls.

pricing._comment: As of 2025. Prompt caching available for 50% input discount.

running_config.description: OpenAI hosted API. Requires OPENAI_API_KEY environment variable.
